sources.title: Art Basel Hong Kong 2026: Samsung Brings Art Into Everyday Life
sources.excerpt: From March 25 to 29, Samsung brought its vision of art at home to Art Basel Hong Kong 2026, where 240 leading galleries from 41 countries and territories gathered for one of the art world’s premier events. At a special booth, Samsung displayed how 2026 Samsung Art TVs bring every artwork to life with breathtaking detail. ▲ Visitors enter Samsung Art Lounge at Art Basel Hong Kong 2026, where large-scale digital artworks introduce an immersive vision of art in everyday life. title: Turning Your Travel Moments Into Lasting Memories ②: San Francisco With Galaxy AI

sources.title: Turning Your Travel Moments Into Lasting Memories ②: San Francisco With Galaxy AI
sources.excerpt: After Part 1 captured San Francisco’s diverse scenery using the Galaxy S26 Ultra camera, this installment turns to what comes next. With advanced AI, Galaxy S26 Ultra edits photos to match user intent and reimagine them as new forms of content. Samsung Newsroom explored how Galaxy S26 Ultra’s AI features enhance travel moments while testing them on location in the city. [Photo Assist] Restore and Refine With a Single Prompt When traveling, it’s easy to reach for the fork before snapping a photo.
